tooltip.mine_fargo.apostle_soul_stone.te:
Single instance of damage taken cannot exceed %d%% of health. Gains %d%% vanilla magic damage/Iron Spells damage/Ars Nouveau damage resistance.
If taking lethal damage, restores %d%% health and gains level %d Resistance for %d seconds, with a %d-second internal cooldown.
Dealing damage restores %d%% health. If health is below %d%%, healing amount increases by %d%%.
§8Dropped by regular Apostles.
Apostle - Single instance of damage taken cannot exceed %d%% of health. Gains %d%% vanilla magic damage/Iron Spells damage/Ars Nouveau damage resistance. If taking lethal damage, restores %d%% health and gains level %d Resistance for %d seconds, with a %d-second internal cooldown. Dealing damage restores %d%% health. If health is below %d%%, healing amount becomes %d%%.
tooltip.mine_fargo.nether_apostle_soul_s:
Immune to fire damage. Restores %d%% health every %d seconds; if health is below %d%%, healing interval shortens to %d%%.
Constantly clears negative status effects on self, and constantly applies Scorching Brand effect to non-familiar entities within %dx%d range around self.
While in the Nether, gain %d%% damage reduction.
Attacks apply Erosion I for %d seconds to the target. If target already has Erosion, has a %d%% chance to increase its level by 1, up to level %d.
§8Dropped by Nether Apostles.
Nether Apostle - Immune to fire damage. Restores %d%% health every %d seconds; if health is below %d%%, healing interval shortens to %d%%. Constantly clears negative status effects on self, and constantly applies Scorching Brand effect to non-familiar entities within %dx%d range around self. tooltip.mine_fargo.vizier_soul_stone.tex:
If the focus has enchantments, its enchantment level is considered to be increased by %d.
Upon receiving lethal damage, kills the closest of the wearer's wraiths within 41x41 range, and restores health equivalent to %d%% of that wraith's health. Has a %d-second internal cooldown.
§8Dropped by the Vizier.
Vizier - If the focus has enchantments, its enchantment level is considered to be increased by %d. Upon receiving lethal damage, kills the closest of the wearer's wraiths within 41x41 range, and restores health equivalent to %d%% of that wraith's health. Has a %d-second internal cooldown.
